# avatar

Avatar field type for config_v2. Stores an icon key, color key, and
pre-rendered SVG nodes — the same `AvatarSpec` shape used by the avatar
primitive. The web renderer wraps the `AvatarPicker` popover around an
`Avatar` preview.

## Usage

```ts
import { avatarField } from "@plugins/config_v2/plugins/fields/plugins/avatar/core";

const myConfig = defineConfig("my-plugin", {
  fields: {
    avatar: avatarField({ label: "Avatar", description: "Choose an icon and color" }),
  },
});
```

## Plugin reference

- Description: Avatar field type (icon + color picker).
- Exports (core):
  - Types: `AvatarFieldDef`, `AvatarSpec`, `SvgNode`
  - Values: `avatarField`, `avatarFieldType`
- Contributes:
  - `Fields.Renderer` "avatar" → `AvatarRenderer`
